question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Embrun will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-03-01?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07591.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-03-01 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-02-19) was 3.625. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Embrun.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - EMBRUN - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07591.D.
